title: Optimization Algorithm Evolution: From SGD to Adam
description: A flowchart showing how Adam combines the core concepts of Momentum and RMSprop to adapt the learning rate for each parameter individually.
relationships: Momentum builds upon SGD by adding velocity to smooth the path.
RMSprop builds upon SGD by adapting the learning rate based on the magnitude of recent gradients.
Adam integrates the velocity concept from Momentum and the per-parameter scaling from RMSprop into a single, unified algorithm.
